npx_runtime_fetch_risk: commands intentionally used npx -y acpx@0.10.0 for Phase -1 capture; V0.1a run path should prefer a pinned local binary/digest.

path_enforcement_conclusion.source_inspection: FileSystemHandlers.resolvePathWithinRoot checks absolute path and isWithinRoot(rootDir, resolved) in acpx@0.10.0 dist/live-checkpoint-CuFft_Nd.js.
path_enforcement_conclusion.summary: acpx@0.10.0 client fs handlers source-resolve absolute paths inside cwd, but Phase -1 did not prove AgentRoleSpec allowed_roots as an OS/filesystem sandbox.
path_enforcement_conclusion.v0_1a_rule: Treat allowed_roots as cwd/config validation only unless a later OS sandbox/path-policy layer is added.

permission_policy_fixture.conclusion: acpx@0.10.0 accepts --permission-policy JSON with autoDeny/defaultAction in the observed runner flag family.

schema_summary.stdout_shape: newline-delimited JSON objects observed from acpx --format json

session_contract.status: S1a contract spike evidence captured; S1 session support remains Planned and unimplemented.
session_contract.management_command_schema: Each management command emits a single summarized JSON object (acpx.session.v1 record or an action snapshot), NOT a raw ACP NDJSON stream.
session_contract.prompt_command_schema: Prompt turns emit raw newline-delimited ACP/JSON-RPC stdout; turn2 reuses the same ACP session id and omits initialize/session-new setup.

schema_summary.session_continuity: turn1 and turn2 share exactly one ACP session id

fixtures.name: session-prompt-turn2
fixtures.semantics: follow-up prompt; session/prompt+session/update only, no initialize/session-new

fixtures.name: session-history-after-turns
fixtures.semantics: count>0 entries carrying the persistent sessionId

fixtures.name: session-read-tail-after-turns
fixtures.semantics: count>0 entries carrying the persistent sessionId

fixtures.name: session-cancel-no-active
fixtures.semantics: action=cancel_result, cancelled=false (idle cancel is not close)

skipped_fixtures.name: interrupted-exit130
skipped_fixtures.reason: Reliable SIGINT orchestration is deferred; V0.1a classifier will still table-test 130 without a live acpx fixture.
